testcase.name: inventoryPage_ShowsSixProducts
testcase.system-out: Found 6 inventory items on page — PASSED

testcase.name: sortByPriceLowToHigh_FirstItemIsCheapest

failure.message: AssertionError: expected [Sauce Labs Backpack ($29.99)] but got [Sauce Labs Bike Light ($9.99)]

testcase.system-out: Sort dropdown selected: lohi First price shown: $29.99 (expected $9.99)
testcase.system-err: ERROR: Sort may not have applied before assertion — consider adding explicit wait

testcase.name: productDetailPage_ShowsCorrectInfo
testcase.system-out: Clicked first product — detail page loaded, name and price visible — PASSED

testcase.name: validCredentials_redirectsToInventory
testcase.system-out: Login with standard_user successful — URL contains inventory.html

testcase.name: lockedOutUser_showsErrorBanner
testcase.system-out: Error banner 'locked out' message present — PASSED

testcase.name: emptyUsername_showsValidationError
testcase.system-out: Submitted with empty username — error banner: 'Epic sadface: Username is required' — PASSED
